name: Baked Herberd Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Trim any excess fat from the chicken breast and pound it lightly between two sheets of waxed paper to flatten.
3. Brush the chicken with olive oil and place in a baking dish.
4. Add wine, lemon juice, herbs (tarragon and basil), and pepper flakes. Turn the chicken to coat both sides.
5. Cover the dish with foil and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
6. Serve with Quinoa and Spaghetti Squash.
